nodes.label: Digital Nepal Conclave Event Hall Photo
nodes.norm_label: digital nepal conclave event hall photo

nodes.label: Digital Karnali Conclave 2024 Panel Discussion Photo
nodes.norm_label: digital karnali conclave 2024 panel discussion photo

nodes.label: Digital Leadership Dialogue 1.2 Panel Discussion Event Photo
nodes.description: Panel discussion stage photo from the Digital Leadership Dialogue 1.2 event, a joint initiative of IFN (ICT Foundation Nepal) and Tech Media. Seven panelists seated on a red-carpeted stage in front of a large purple backdrop banner. The event theme is 'Manifesto to Action: Ensuring Execution of Digital Commitments - Accountability, Budgeting, Governance & Measurable Impact.' Branded podiums with Digital Leadership Dialogue 1.2 branding are placed in front of each panelist. An audience is visible in the foreground.
nodes.norm_label: digital leadership dialogue 1.2 panel discussion event photo

nodes.label: Digital Madhesh Conclave 2025 Chief Guest Speech Event Photo
nodes.description: Wide-angle photo of the Digital Madhesh Conclave 2025 event. A speaker (Hon. Satish Kumar Singh, Chief Minister, Madhesh Province) delivers Chief Guest Remarks at a podium on the left. Behind him is a large LED screen displaying the slide 'Empowering Digital Madhesh: Fostering Digitalization and Development.' The audience fills a large banquet-style hall with chairs. Media personnel and videographers are visible in the middle of the hall. The event banner reads 'Fostering Digital Madhesh.'
nodes.norm_label: digital madhesh conclave 2025 chief guest speech event photo

nodes.label: Google Career Certificates Scholarship Program Promotional Illustration
nodes.description: A cinematic digital illustration showing a person with a backpack walking toward a glowing futuristic arch portal at night. The arch is decorated with circuit-board patterns and icons representing education (graduation cap, certificate, arrows). Through the arch, a glowing city skyline is visible. The mood is aspirational and technology-themed, representing digital education and career opportunities.
nodes.norm_label: google career certificates scholarship program promotional illustration

nodes.label: Grow with Google Career Certificates Scholarship Program Banner
nodes.description: Promotional banner graphic for the 'Grow with Google - Google Career Certificates' Scholarship Program. Features the IFN (ICT Foundation Nepal) logo at top left and a 'Scholarship Program' badge at top right. The banner includes application details: Apply Now button linking to pages.merojob.com/google-career-certificate-program-ifn, deadline of 31st May 2026 (23:55 hrs), and collaborating logos of Google and Merojob. A QR code is provided for scanning to apply. Clean white background with colorful Google-branded accents.
nodes.event_name: Grow with Google Career Certificates Scholarship Program
nodes.norm_label: grow with google career certificates scholarship program banner

nodes.label: ICT Gyan School Students Audience Event Photo
nodes.description: Wide shot of a large gathering of school students seated on the floor inside a hall or gymnasium with a corrugated metal roof. Students are wearing school uniforms in green and white. The hall is packed with hundreds of students facing toward the front of the room where a presenter or facilitator stands. The setting suggests a school-level ICT education or awareness program.
nodes.norm_label: ict gyan school students audience event photo

nodes.label: ICT Awards Nepal Group Photo of Winners on Stage
nodes.description: Group photo of approximately 20 award winners and organizers on a decorated stage at the ICT Awards Nepal, described as 'The Biggest Tech Award of Nepal.' The stage has dramatic stage lighting with green spotlights, trophies, and award banners on either side. The backdrop shows logos of InDrive (presenting sponsor), LWICT, and IFN. Winners are holding certificates and wearing orange scarves/sashes, posing for a group photograph.
nodes.norm_label: ict awards nepal group photo of winners on stage

nodes.label: Incubation Program Group Photo - Participants Outside Building
nodes.description: Group photo of approximately 25 participants wearing lanyards/badges posing in front of a red brick building with a Reception sign. Appears to be an incubation program cohort photo taken outdoors.
nodes.norm_label: incubation program group photo - participants outside building

nodes.label: Pre-Budget ICT Discourse 2083 Panel Discussion Event Photo
nodes.description: Panel discussion at the Pre-Budget ICT Discourse 2083 event held at Hotel Himalaya, Lalitpur on Thursday 30 April 2025 (2083 Baisakh 17). Theme: Accelerating Digital Transformation - Strategic ICT Priorities for Budget 2083/84. Five panelists seated in chairs on stage with branded backdrop showing IFN logo.
nodes.norm_label: pre-budget ict discourse 2083 panel discussion event photo

nodes.label: Digital Lumbini Samvad 4.0 ICT Policy Dialogue Event Photo
nodes.description: Panel discussion at Digital Lumbini Samvad 4.0 (डिजिटल लुम्बिनी संवाद), an ICT Policy dialogue program as a provincial premiere of Digital Nepal Conclave 2023. In association with FonePay. Tagline: Fostering Digitally Shakchyam Lumbini Pradesh. Six panelists seated on stage with large branded backdrop featuring robot imagery.
nodes.norm_label: digital lumbini samvad 4.0 ict policy dialogue event photo

nodes.label: Startup Idea - Orbitcon 2.0 Engineering Expo Robotics Event Photo
nodes.description: Crowd of school students in uniforms watching a robot soccer/football demonstration at Orbitcon 2.0 Engineering Expo. Two remote-controlled robots are competing on a small green field while a judge/host observes. Startup-themed event with various sponsor banners visible.
nodes.norm_label: startup idea - orbitcon 2.0 engineering expo robotics event photo

nodes.label: IFN Google Career Certificates Scholarship Program Banner
nodes.description: Promotional banner for 'Grow with Google - Google Career Certificates' scholarship program. Shows IFN (ICT Foundation Nepal) logo and collaboration with Google and Merojob. Colorful wave design with red, yellow, green, and teal accents. Green 'Scholarship Program' badge in top right corner.
nodes.norm_label: ifn google career certificates scholarship program banner

nodes.label: IFN Official Event Stage Group Photo - Hero Banner
nodes.description: Large group of dignitaries and participants standing on a stage at an IFN (ICT Foundation Nepal) official event. The IFN logo is prominently displayed on a large screen backdrop. A central figure is speaking at a microphone/podium. Participants wearing traditional Nepali attire and formal clothes, many with red scarves (khada). Used as the hero/banner image for the website.
nodes.norm_label: ifn official event stage group photo - hero banner

nodes.label: Hero Slideshow Image 2 - Digital Health Panel Discussion
nodes.description: Panel discussion on stage at a formal conference hall. The large LED screen backdrop reads 'Digital Health for All: Readiness, Innovation, and Equity in Nepal's Healthcare Transformation'. Multiple panelists are seated on stage. IFN branding visible. Session appears to be part of a Digital Nepal or health technology event.
nodes.norm_label: hero slideshow image 2 - digital health panel discussion

nodes.label: Hero Slideshow Image 3 - Digital Nepal Conclave 2025 Speaker
nodes.description: A speaker named Manohar K Bhattarai speaking at a podium at the Digital Nepal Conclave 2025. The podium displays the 'Digital Nepal Conclave 2025' branding, organized by IFN, powered by Ting Ting and Raindrop. The backdrop screen reads 'Revisiting Nepal's Digital Agenda - Driving [Innovation] for Digital Nepal'. Theme: 'Empowering Digital Nepal, Together'.
nodes.norm_label: hero slideshow image 3 - digital nepal conclave 2025 speaker

nodes.label: Hero Slideshow Image 4 - Digital Leadership Dialogue 1.2 Panel
nodes.description: Panel discussion on a red-carpeted stage at the Digital Leadership Dialogue 1.2 event. The backdrop banner reads 'Digital Leadership Dialogue 1.2 - Manifesto to Action: Ensuring Execution of Digital Commitments - Accountability, Budgeting, Governance & Measurable Impact.' Organized as a joint initiative of IFN and Tech Nepal. Ummedwar Mela branding also visible. Several panelists are seated in a row.
nodes.norm_label: hero slideshow image 4 - digital leadership dialogue 1.2 panel

nodes.label: Hero Slideshow Image 5 - Digital Nepal Conclave 2025 Group Photo
nodes.description: Large group photograph of attendees at the Digital Nepal Conclave 2025 held in a grand hotel ballroom. Hundreds of participants stand together in a formal group photo. Top right corner shows the Digital Nepal Conclave 2025 and IFN (ICT Federation Nepal) logos. Powered by Ting Ting and Raindrop.
nodes.norm_label: hero slideshow image 5 - digital nepal conclave 2025 group photo

nodes.label: ICT Award Logo
nodes.description: Official logo of the ICT Award. Features a golden trophy/award figurine styled with a ribbon or flame motif in red, gold, and yellow. The text 'ICT AWARD' is displayed prominently in bold gold and dark navy/purple letters. Used to represent an ICT industry recognition or award program in Nepal.

nodes.label: ICT Gyan Logo
nodes.description: Logo of ICT Gyan, an ICT education or knowledge program. Depicts a green globe made of dots alongside a green pencil and an open orange book, symbolizing digital education and literacy. The text 'ICTGYAN' appears in bold with 'ICT' in green and 'GYAN' in orange. Likely a digital literacy or education initiative.

nodes.label: IFN Logo White Variant
nodes.description: White variant of the IFN (ICT Foundation Nepal) logo featuring the red circular dot above stylized 'IFN' letters. The text portions are rendered in white, making it suitable for use on dark backgrounds. Red circle accent is retained.

nodes.label: IFN Organization Logo
nodes.description: Primary logo of ICT Foundation Nepal (IFN). Features bold blue stylized letters 'IFN' with a red circular dot above the 'i', and the full organization name 'ICT FOUNDATION NEPAL' in gray text below. The design incorporates a small arrow/star shape within the letters.

nodes.label: Nepal AI Summit 2026 Logo
nodes.description: Logo for the Nepal AI Summit 2026. Features a blue mountain/Himalaya silhouette with circuit board pattern overlaid, and bold text reading 'NEPAL AI SUMMIT 2026' in blue. Represents a technology and artificial intelligence conference event in Nepal.

nodes.label: Ananda Raj Khanal - Patron Portrait
nodes.description: Professional headshot portrait of Ananda Raj Khanal, a patron of IFN. Middle-aged South Asian man with curly dark hair and a beard, wearing a dark gray button-up shirt, arms crossed, smiling. Light neutral background.

nodes.label: Birendra Mishra - Patron Portrait
nodes.description: Professional headshot portrait of Birendra Mishra, a patron of IFN. Middle-aged South Asian man with dark hair and mustache, wearing glasses, a gray blazer over a checkered shirt, and an orange/red lanyard. Light neutral background.

nodes.label: Ganesh Shah - Patron Portrait
nodes.description: Professional headshot portrait of Ganesh Shah, a patron of IFN. Older South Asian man with gray hair, smiling warmly, wearing a dark navy blazer over a light blue shirt. Light neutral background.

properties.description: Headshot portrait of an older woman wearing glasses, a light pink blazer over a pink sari, with a bindi, wearing organizer badges including a WIT badge
Portrait of a middle-aged man wearing glasses, a grey suit with a tie, and a traditional Nepali dhaka/madal garland around his neck, smiling broadly
Portrait of an older man wearing glasses, a dark blazer, and a red traditional Nepali scarf/dhoti around his neck, holding what appears to be a certificate of appreciation
Professional portrait of a middle-aged man in a grey blazer with a blue tie, arms crossed, slight smile
Portrait of an older man wearing glasses and a reddish-brown traditional Nepali vest/waistcoat (daura suruwal style vest) over a grey shirt, with a pin on chest
Generic grey silhouette avatar/placeholder image used for members without a photo — circular icon with head and shoulder outline

nodes.label: Default Team Member Placeholder Image
nodes.description: Generic user/person placeholder avatar icon. Shows a circular silhouette with a white head circle and shoulder arc on a grey background. Used as a fallback portrait when a team member has no uploaded photo.

nodes.label: IFN (ICT Foundation Nepal) Logo Thumbnail
nodes.description: Thumbnail image showing the IFN logo — a stylized 'iFN' lettermark with a person/arrow motif — and the full name 'ICT FOUNDATION NEPAL' in white text on a grey background. Used as an Open Graph/social share thumbnail or fallback preview image for the website.

attributes.subject: IFN organization logo
attributes.purpose: website thumbnail / OG image / preview card

nodes.label: Next.js Wordmark SVG Logo
nodes.description: Official Next.js wordmark logo in SVG format. Renders the word 'Next.js' in its canonical typographic style using black fill paths. Included by default in the Next.js starter template and used to identify the framework used to build the site.

nodes.label: Vercel Triangle Logo SVG
nodes.description: Official Vercel logo in SVG format. Consists of a single equilateral triangle (pointing upward) filled white — the canonical Vercel brand mark. Included by default in the Next.js starter template to represent the Vercel deployment platform.

nodes.label: Browser Window SVG Icon
nodes.description: Simple SVG icon depicting a browser or application window. Shows a rounded rectangle frame with a toolbar area at the top containing three small circular dots (representing browser window controls). Used as a generic UI/browser icon, part of the Next.js default template assets.
